name: calendar_list
description: List upcoming events, search past events, and find events by attendee, title, or keyword. Supports free-text search and date range queries.

query.description: Search query — find events by title, description, location, or attendee name/email. Examples: 'Mike Miller', 'design review', 'budget meeting'

max_results.description: Maximum number of events to return (default 10, max 50)

days_ahead.description: Number of days ahead to search (default 7, max 365). Used when looking for upcoming events.

days_back.description: Number of days back to search (max 365). Used when searching past events like 'when was my last meeting with X'.

start_time.description: Explicit start of search range (ISO 8601). Use with end_time for custom date ranges.

end_time.description: Explicit end of search range (ISO 8601). Use with start_time for custom date ranges.

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID (default: 'primary'). Use email for shared calendars.

instructions:
Use this tool to list upcoming events OR search for past/future events.

**Upcoming events:** Just call with defaults or set days_ahead.
**Search by person:** Use query='Mike Miller' with days_back=90 to find past meetings.
**Search by topic:** Use query='budget review' to find events by title/description.
**Date range:** Use start_time + end_time for a specific window.

The query parameter searches across event titles, descriptions, locations, and attendee names/emails.
